overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in period clothing walking through a muddy, rainy historic city street resembling 19th century New Orleans. The character passes by iron-balconied buildings, tram tracks, and interacts with streetcars and horse-drawn carriages in a moody, atmospheric setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy historic street with tram tracks and iron balconies

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the muddy street between historic buildings with iron balconies

notable_agents.action: sitting on a bench against the building wall

entered.detail: multi-story brick building with ornate iron balconies and large windows
historic brick building with wooden second-floor balconies
metal tram tracks running down the center of the muddy cobblestone street
stacked wooden barrels and crates on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a muddy, rain-slicked historic street lined with multi-story brick buildings featuring ornate iron balconies. Tram tracks run down the center of the cobblestone road, and a few NPCs sit idly on benches along the left sidewalk.

events.description: passing a parked black carriage on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, approaching an intersection with a large building visible ahead

notable_agents.action: black horse-drawn carriage parked on the side of the muddy street

entered.detail: weathered white building with faded 'SOUTHERN' painted signage on the upper floor

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the street, passing a parked carriage on the right. A large white building with faded painted signage comes into view on the right, while the tram tracks lead toward an intersection ahead.

events.description: large green streetcar passes by on the right side, moving along the tracks
character begins turning left at the intersection onto a new street

agents.ego_description: walking forward as a streetcar passes on the right, then turning left at the corner

notable_agents.action: green streetcar moving along the tracks, passing the character from behind

entered.detail: corner building with distinctive green shutters, arched doorways, and iron balcony

segments.scene_description: At the intersection, a large green streetcar passes by on the right. The character continues to the corner and begins turning left, passing a distinctive building with green shutters. The tram tracks curve to the right as the character changes direction.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage moves ahead on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the new street toward a market entrance, following a moving carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving away from the camera down the muddy street

entered.detail: yellow brick archway entrance with 'Market' signage and 'Open Daily' text
two-story building with large carriage doors on the ground floor and balcony above

segments.scene_description: Having turned onto a new street, the character walks toward a yellow brick market archway on the left. A horse-drawn carriage moves ahead on the right, and the tram tracks continue in the distance. The street maintains the same muddy, historic character with multi-story buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked historic district that transitions from a straight residential corridor to a bustling market intersection. It begins by trailing a character down a muddy cobblestone street lined with ornate iron balconies and idle figures on benches. As the character advances, the view opens up to reveal a parked carriage and a large white building with faded signage before reaching a busy intersection. The scene then shifts as a large green streetcar passes by on the right, prompting the camera to follow the character as they turn left past a building with green shutters. Finally, the movement leads onto a new street, passing a horse-drawn carriage and heading toward a yellow brick market archway under the persistent rain.
